description:
Reprofx Spirit Classic Thermal Roll is made with the same high quality dyes and stencil transfer paper as the classic Spirit Thermal sheets, but now is available in a continuous 100 foot roll. The Spirit Classic Thermal Roll allows artists to custom cut the size of stencil needed, as long or as short, saving artists time and money.

Always use an Extra-Long Reprofx® Carrier with the Spirit® Classic Thermal Roll in Thermal Machines.

100 continuous feet of Spirit® Thermal Paper!
Compatible with all thermal printers
Consistant, high quality images
Skin safe & shelf-stable
